basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi has released the official notification for 1 Project Research Scientist III (Medical) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Delhi. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: For Project Research Scientist III (Medical): The maximum age limit is 45 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS + MD in Psychiatry including the integrated PG degrees + three years post qualification experience
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist III (Medical): MBBS + MD in Psychiatry, including the integrated PG degrees + three years' post qualification experience

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.event: Last Date for online submission (CV and Documents)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) posts is 15 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Research Scientist III (Medical) post in the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026. Interested candidates should check the official notification for details.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for Project Research Scientist III (Medical) posts at AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Project Research Scientist III (Medical) post should not exceed 45 years of age. Age relaxation rules may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Project Research Scientist III (Medical) at AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Research Scientist III (Medical) post will receive a salary of Rs. 1,20,900 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) Recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for General/OBC, SC/ST categories for the AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) Recruitment. The fee is Nil for all categories.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications for Project Research Scientist III (Medical) in AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an MBBS + MD in Psychiatry, including integrated PG degrees, plus three years of post-qualification experience. Refer to the official notification for complete details.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Research Scientist III (Medical) post includes an Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates must clear both stages.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Research Scientist III (Medical) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of AIIMS Delhi. The application link will be active until 15 July 2026. Follow the instructions in the "How to Apply" section.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the job location be for the Project Research Scientist III (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The job location for the Project Research Scientist III (Medical) post will be in New Delhi, Delhi. This is a government job opportunity in the capital city.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual position?
faq.answer: The Project Research Scientist III (Medical) post at AIIMS Delhi is a contractual job type. Candidates should review the terms and conditions in the official notification for more details.
